name: Moneytree
description_short: Moneytree offers payday and installment loans up to $5,000 with same-day or next-day funding, plus check cashing and wire transfer services at Nevada locations.
description_long:
Moneytree is a Nevada-based consumer finance company operating physical branch locations, including this North Las Vegas Craig Road branch. The company specializes in short-term lending products designed to provide quick access to cash for customers facing immediate financial needs. With extended business hours (7:00 AM to 11:00 PM most weekdays), Moneytree positions itself as a convenient alternative to traditional bank loans for time-sensitive situations.

Moneytree's primary offerings include payday loans up to $5,000, installment loans ranging from $50 to $5,000, and signature loans. Customers can receive funds in multiple ways: in cash at the branch, via ACH transfer to a bank account (online loans only), or through Instant Funding to a qualified debit card (typically 30-45 minutes). The company also provides ancillary services including check cashing, business check cashing, prepaid cards, and wire transfers. All products are available both in-branch and online for Nevada residents.

Moneytree's payday loans carry a flat fee of $16.50 per $100 borrowed, which translates to a 430.18% APR on a 14-day loan. The company emphasizes convenience and speed, allowing same-day or next-day funding for qualified applicants. Moneytree does not serve active military members under the Military Lending Act. The company requires applicants to maintain a current, good-standing account and references a state database system that tracks borrowing activity across Nevada lenders.

While Moneytree offers genuine convenience for emergency cash needs, the APR structure reflects the high-cost nature of payday lending. The company prominently displays required disclosures that these products are for short-term use only and recommends credit counseling for customers with credit difficulties. Borrowers should carefully evaluate whether a payday loan's convenience justifies the substantial cost, as the 430% APR significantly exceeds what traditional lenders or credit-builder alternatives charge.
address: 4210 W Craig Rd #106, North Las Vegas, NV 89032

company_info.headquarters: 4210 W Craig Rd #106, North Las Vegas, NV 89032

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for approved applicants
Extended business hours (7 AM–11 PM most days; 8 AM–9 PM Saturdays) for accessibility
Multiple fund delivery methods: cash, ACH transfer, or debit card deposit
Low minimum for installment loans ($50), accommodating very small borrowing needs
Transparent flat-fee structure ($16.50 per $100) disclosed upfront
Physical branch locations for in-person application and service
Additional services beyond loans (check cashing, wire transfers, prepaid cards)
cons: Extremely high APR of 430.18% on payday loans, despite flat-fee structure
Short repayment terms encourage recurring borrowing and debt traps
Company explicitly recommends credit counseling before loan approval
Borrowing ability restricted by state database tracking across Nevada lenders
Cannot serve active military members, limiting availability for some consumers
best_for: Salaried employees needing cash to bridge a 1-2 week gap until payday
Individuals without bank access who need check cashing or money transfer services
Borrowers seeking the fastest possible funding for genuine emergencies
diagnosis: Moneytree is best for employed individuals facing a genuine short-term cash emergency with no other borrowing options, who can repay within 2–3 months. The critical caveat is that the 430% APR makes this an extremely expensive form of credit; borrowers should exhaust all alternatives (employer advances, credit union PALs, family loans, credit lines) before using payday loans, as the cost can create a cycle of recurring debt.
